title: croton kelantanicus
intro: Croton kelantanicus, also known as the Kelantan croton, is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. It is a shrub or small tree with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves, roots, and bark, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Croton kelantanicus include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
